name: java-app-advisor
description: Critically analyzes a Java application to find architectural, design, security, performance, and technical-debt issues, then writes two report files. Single skill (`java-app-advisor`) that runs a phased workflow — Phase 1 orient, Phase 2 scope, Phase 3 analyze five areas (architecture & design, security & dependencies, performance & configuration, testing & API, technical debt), Phase 4 Findings Report, Phase 5 Remediation Backlog with exact before/after code changes. Each area's detection playbook lives in an internal reference file; no user-invocable sub-skills. Supports Spring Boot, Micronaut, Quarkus, and plain Java (web, standalone, batch, CLI).
